commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: extract git functions and clean up data flow (#7)

* feat: add issue display to statusline rendering

Show #N from .issue file on feature branches (green=matching,
yellow=mismatched). Show open issues on main. PR takes priority.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: wire .issue file reading and open issues fetching

Read .issue file on feature branches (no PR). Fetch open issues
via gh on main/master. Both use cachedRun for non-blocking I/O.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add --hook flag for UserPromptSubmit issue enforcement

Checks git branch and .issue file state. On main, deletes .issue.
On feature branches, prompts agent to link an issue if missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add .issue to gitignore, add E2E hook test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove invalid --sort flag from gh issue list

gh issue list doesn't support --sort; default order (newest first)
is already what we want.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: hide branch name on main when open issues are shown

Issues themselves signal you're on the default branch, so showing
'main' is redundant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: show yellow dirty marker on main even when branch name is hidden

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: use Unicode ellipsis … instead of three dots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always color dirty marker * yellow on all branches

Previously the * was only yellow in the PR code path (dirty prefix).
Normal branch path (main*) rendered it as plain text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address code review feedback

- Fix weak test assertion (&&→|| to verify both values present)
- Add JSON struct tags to OpenIssue
- Document why --sort is omitted from gh issue list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: address minor code review feedback

- Add GitBranch/GitDirty fields to RenderContext, eliminating fragile
  string parsing of GitInfo for branch detection
- Extract parseIssueFile helper to DRY .issue parsing between main()
  and hookMain()
- Add test for invalid .issue file format in hook

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: extract git logic from main() into focused functions

Extract inline git/PR/issue logic from the monolithic main() function
into gatherGitInfo, buildPRGitInfo, fetchIssueLinks, lookupIssueFile,
and fetchMainIssues. Also moves type definitions to top of file, removes
unused underline constant, and adds --hook installation to install.sh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: use GitDirty boolean instead of string-encoded dirty state

Remove the "dirty" string protocol where gatherGitInfo encoded "*" in
the info string and buildPRGitInfo embedded "dirty" as a prefix, which
renderStatusline then parsed back out. Now dirty state flows exclusively
through the GitDirty boolean field on RenderContext.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: replace GitInfo string with explicit PRDisplay field

Remove the mixed-purpose GitInfo field that carried both branch names
and PR display strings. PR detection now uses PRDisplay != "" instead
of strings.Contains(ctx.GitInfo, "PR/"). Also removes the redundant
"git:" prefix that was always added then stripped.

Additionally optimizes normalizePath to check cheap string prefix
before expensive os.Lstat syscall.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add excluded_commit_patterns support for single and range reviews (#454)

## Summary

- Add `excluded_commit_patterns` field to `RepoConfig` for skipping
reviews based on commit message substrings (case-insensitive)
- Add `IsCommitMessageExcluded` for single commits and
`AllCommitMessagesExcluded` for ranges, backed by a shared
`messageMatchesPatterns` helper
- Wire exclusion checks into `handleEnqueue` for both single-commit and
range-based review paths, returning `skipped: true` with the same JSON
shape as branch exclusion
- Guard range exclusion against partial `GetCommitInfo` failures — only
skip when every commit in the range was successfully read and matches
- Add config-level unit tests and server-level `handleEnqueue`
integration tests covering matching, non-matching, all-excluded range,
mixed range, and corrupt mid-range commit scenarios

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Rory Schadler <48921090+roryschadler@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: instant check-in on every commit via COMMIT_EDITMSG watcher

Instead of waiting up to 5 minutes for the poll interval, chokidar now
watches .git/COMMIT_EDITMSG and triggers a scan immediately on each
commit. Alfred pops up within ~1 second of a push.

- 테이블을 카드 레이아웃으로 변경

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: checkout buttons always active for non-logged-in users

Previously CheckoutButton disabled itself when lsVariantsConfigured was
false — even for landing/pricing page visitors who aren't logged in and
would only be redirected to /login anyway.

Fix: bypass billing-config check when isLoggedIn is false. The
checkoutState guard now only applies to authenticated users who are
actually about to hit /api/checkout. Non-logged-in clicks always go to
/login?next=/pricing regardless of env var state.

This makes "Choose Pro" and "Claim Founder Access" on the pricing page
always clickable for new visitors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add time-based knowledge evolution research

Key insights on tiles as cultural knowledge:

1. **Knowledge Evolution Stages:**
   - Stage 1: Ephemeral (high mutation, low fidelity)
   - Stage 2: Working (medium mutation, medium fidelity)
   - Stage 3: Embedded (low mutation, high fidelity)
   - Stage 4: Fossil (zero mutation, perfect fidelity)

2. **Cultural Transmission Patterns:**
   - Conformist bias (70% preference for majority variants)
   - Innovation rate (15% enables evolution)
   - Cultural landmarks (5+ adopters for tradition status)

3. **Meme Fitness Factors:**
   - Replication fidelity
   - Cognitive hook (leverages existing frameworks)
   - Utility value (demonstrable value)
   - Simplicity & memorability

4. **Tile Aging Mechanism:**
   - Transmission fidelity tracking
   - Cultural persistence scoring
   - Wisdom keeper promotion (top 10%)
   - Knowledge crystallization across generations

This connects human cultural knowledge evolution to POLLN's tile system - tiles don't just store information, they carry patterns that evolve through time.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(mneme): access tracking schema + knowledge graph data audit (#598)

## Summary

- Add 4 columns to CozoDB `facts` relation: `access_count`,
`last_accessed_at`, `stability_hours`, `fact_type`
- Instrument `search_hybrid()` and `search_vectors()` to increment
access counters on returned facts (fire-and-forget, warn on failure)
- Add `increment_access()` / `increment_access_async()` public API
- Add `default_stability_hours()` mapping for FSRS decay model
calibration
- Implement v1→v2 schema migration (read all → drop → recreate →
reinsert with defaults → rebuild FTS)
- Bump `SCHEMA_VERSION` from 1 to 2
- Update all raw Datalog `:put` queries across `knowledge_adapter.rs`,
`migrate_memory.rs`, and integration tests to carry new columns
- Add `FactsField` variants: `AccessCount`, `LastAccessedAt`,
`StabilityHours`, `FactType`
- New integration test file `access_tracking.rs` with
insert→search→verify and triple-search tests
- Ignored `knowledge_graph_data_audit` test for manual diagnostics

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo test -p aletheia-mneme --no-default-features --features
mneme-engine --lib` — 298 passed
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --no-default-features --features
mneme-engine --lib` — no new warnings (4 pre-existing unfulfilled lint
expectations)
- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia-nous -p aletheia-organon` — clean
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-nous -p aletheia-organon` — clean
- [ ] Integration tests blocked by pre-existing `graph-algo` feature
unification issue (same on main)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
docs(mneme): correct embedding model, feature flags, and dependency list (#597)

## Summary

Documentation accuracy pass for mneme-related claims. Fixed 9
discrepancies where docs diverged from code.

## Discrepancies Found and Fixed

### docs/TECHNOLOGY.md (5 fixes)

| # | Error | Fix |
|---|-------|-----|
| 1 | Default model listed as `nomic-embed-text-v1.5` | Corrected to
`BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5` (384 dims) — per `embedding.rs:157` |
| 2 | Feature flag listed as `embed-local` | Corrected to `fastembed` —
per `Cargo.toml:17` |
| 3 | `cozo` listed in pinning rules as external crate | Removed —
engine is vendored source, no crate dependency |
| 4 | Unified store Choice: `cozo (CozoDB)` | Clarified as `Vendored
Datalog engine (from CozoDB)` |
| 5 | mneme deps: `cozo, taxis, reqwest, blake3` | Removed phantom deps,
added actual: `snafu, serde, tracing, rusqlite, jiff, ndarray` |

### docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (3 fixes)

| # | Error | Fix |
|---|-------|-----|
| 6 | mneme described as `CozoDB embedded` | Updated to `vendored
Datalog` terminology |
| 7 | Submodule `store` described as `CozoDB: vectors, graph...` | Split
into `store` (SQLite sessions) and `knowledge` (Datalog graph) |
| 8 | Submodule `embed` (nonexistent name) | Corrected to `embedding`
(actual file name) |

### docs/ARCHITECTURE-GUIDE.md (1 fix)

| # | Error | Fix |
|---|-------|-----|
| 9 | `embedded CozoDB for knowledge graphs` | Changed to `vendored
Datalog engine` |

## Verified Accurate (no change needed)

- `ARCHITECTURE.md` lines 115, 154, 274 — already say "vendored CozoDB
engine behind `mneme-engine` feature gate"
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` line 92 — `cozo/` runtime data directory is the
actual on-disk path
- `CONFIGURATION.md` — already says `BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5`
- `crates/mneme/README.md` — does not exist

## Test plan

- [x] No remaining `nomic-embed-text` references in changed files
- [x] No remaining `embed-local` references in changed files
- [x] Markdown tables render correctly
- [x] Docs-only change — no build/test impact

commit.message:
Data Tab: Territory Of column + per-column filters

- public/data/geoquiz_supplemental_data.json: added territory_of field to all
  246 entries (39 territories mapped to parent countries, nations = null; also
  added stub entries for 8 territories that were missing from supplemental)

- src/utils/mergedData.js: picks up territory_of from supplemental data

- src/components/DataTab/DataTab.jsx: major rewrite
  · New "Territory Of" column after Name (parent country for territories, "—" for nations)
  · Second thead row with per-column filter controls:
      text inputs — Name, Capital
      regular <select> dropdowns — Region (synced with toolbar), Territory Of,
        Sovereignty Type, Travel Advisory (Level 1–4 + N/A)
      SearchableDropdown with portal — Independence From (33 distinct values;
        fixed-position panel with search input, scrollable list, "All" / "—" / values)
      numeric range inputs (min/max) — Population, Pop. Density, Area km²,
        GDP PPP/capita, HDI (0-1 step 0.001), Indep. Year (negative = BCE)
  · Active-filter dot indicator (blue circle) on column header when filter set
  · Column header text turns blue when filter is active
  · "Clear Filters" button in toolbar appears when any filter is active
  · All filters AND-logic combined with scope filter
  · Toolbar Region dropdown stays as convenience shortcut, synced with column filter
  · CSV export and "Showing X of Y" count reflect all active filters

commit.message:
Connect Document Storage to Supabase cloud storage

- Files now upload to Supabase Storage instead of localStorage
- Supports up to 50MB files (was 5MB with base64)
- Files persist in the cloud across devices and browsers
- Added loading states and toast notifications for all operations
- Kept same UI, branding, folders, and light/dark theme

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: RISE plan generation synchronous — eliminates unreliable background worker

Worker-based async generation was failing silently (3 of 4 attempts stuck at
"generating" with 0 tokens). Now runs inline with set_time_limit(600).
Browser waits 3-6 min for Claude response — no polling needed.

- generate-plan.php: RISE path now calls claude_call() directly
- admin.html: JS handles synchronous response instead of polling
- Auto-reset stuck "generating" records older than 5 min still in place

Add first draft sales landing page for Hausverwaltungen

Dan Kennedy sales letter framework + Hormozi value equation.
Person-first positioning: targets the Inhaber, not company transformation.
Includes: pain narrative, Telegram mockup, case study, objection handling,
price anchor, 90-day pilot guarantee, founder section, no-change-management
differentiator. Copy stress-tested against AI persona of target customer.

commit.message:
Platform improvements batch 1: store & error fixes

- Initialize all store list slices to empty literals so JSON serializes
  as [] instead of null when no rows match
- Add typed AppError with HTTP status codes (404/400/409) and
  NotFoundErr/ValidationErr/ConflictErr constructors
- Update handleErr to dispatch AppError before falling back to
  pgx.ErrNoRows check
- Migrate dependency store errors: not-found → 404, cycle → 409
- Migrate note store: invalid parent type → 400 ValidationErr
- Remove CycleError-specific handling from dependency handler (now
  generic via AppError)
- Add input length validation (checkLen) across all create/update
  handlers
- Add enum validation for task status/priority in create, update,
  and filter paths
- Health endpoint now pings database, returns 503 when unreachable
- Add COALESCE LEFT JOIN convention comment to store package
- Expand .gitignore, add test/cover Makefile targets, add testutil
  package

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Force dynamic rendering on all pages to fix Vercel build

All pages use client-side hooks (useUser, usePrivy) that require
runtime context. Adding force-dynamic prevents static prerendering
which fails without env vars at build time.

commit.message:
Replace Stripe redirect checkout with embedded modal

Stripe checkout now renders in an iframe modal instead of redirecting
to stripe.com. Uses Stripe Embedded Checkout (ui_mode: embedded) with
client secret flow via fetch API + Alpine.js.

- BillingService returns client_secret instead of redirect URL
- BillingController returns JSON response instead of redirect
- New <x-stripe-checkout-modal> component with loading/error states
- Subscribe buttons dispatch Alpine event instead of form POST
- Stripe.js loaded via CDN for authenticated users
- Updated test to expect JSON 503 instead of redirect

commit.message:
Add HiDPI/4K monitor support to ImGui GUI

- Rasterize font at scaled pixel size (14px * dpiScale) for crisp text
- Scale ImGui theme padding, rounding, and spacing by DPI factor
- Set DisplayFramebufferScale correctly each frame for proper rendering
- Use framebuffer size for GL viewport on HiDPI displays

* fix: prevent page scroll when dragging Coco bubble on mobile

Use imperative addEventListener with { passive: false } for touch events
instead of React's passive-by-default synthetic handlers. Add touch-action:
none CSS to the bubble element.

* fix: always preventDefault on touchmove to stop page scroll

Move preventDefault() before the drag threshold check — by the time the
5px threshold is crossed, the browser has already committed to scrolling.

* fix: use cookie-free Supabase client in reviews OG image

The organizer reviews OG image was returning 500 on Vercel because
createClient() calls cookies() which conflicts with ISR caching in
serverless functions. Replaced with a direct @supabase/supabase-js
client that doesn't need cookies, since OG images only read public data.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(emf-ui): pre-populate form fields from query params on related list new (#455)

When clicking "+ New" on a related list (e.g. Order Items), the
RelatedList component passes the parent record ID as a query parameter
(e.g. ?order_ref=<id>). ObjectFormPage was not reading these params,
so reference fields were left empty. Now computeInitialFormData merges
matching query parameters into the form defaults for new records.

Co-authored-by: Craig Klinker <craigklinker@velocityglobal.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: binge_quest
repository.description: BingeQuest

commit.message:
feat: add Phase 2.5 (recommend tool) + expand Phase 5 (planning engine)

Phase 2.5 — recommend tool:
- Scene-based tool/MCP/plugin recommendations
- 10-15 hardcoded scenario→tool mappings for V1
- Auto-trigger when user repeatedly edits same file type

Phase 5 — planning engine (expanded):
- plan tool: requirements → roadmap + architecture + business flow + tasks
- Roadmap/architecture/business flow document generation
- Task decomposition with effort estimates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: rebuild arena layout to match wireframe — 3-col Oxford Union chamber

Complete rewrite of DebateArenaClient layout to match the wireframe schema:
- Row 1: Commentator (inline PiP) | Scoreboard | Live Commentary
- Row 2: Axiom Panel A | Stage (Debater A | Judge | Debater B) | Axiom Panel B
- Row 3: Controls + Shoutcaster Ticker
- Row 4: BattlefieldGraph + ArgumentLog | BettingPanel
- Row 5: Sponsor Chyron + Synthesis
Oxford Union atmospheric CSS: mahogany wood panels, warm amber lighting,
candle glow, gothic atmosphere. Default view mode set to video.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix sync notifications: remove old progress emails and route to correct recipient

Fixes:
- Remove undefined send_progress_notification() function calls
- Remove unused variables: first_email_sent, last_notification_count
- Remove unused EMAIL_NOTIFICATION_INTERVAL config
- Change notifications to use send_report() instead of send_email()
- All sync reports now go to ss@muffinsky.com (not hello@sinclairpatterns.com)

Behavior:
- No startup emails
- No progress emails during sync
- Only completion email with stats → ss@muffinsky.com
- Only error email when sync fails → ss@muffinsky.com

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
